Before you explore

This map was built by a human researcher with AI assistance. AI helped write the code and locate papers, but did not make editorial decisions about what to include or how to rate evidence.

Many sources haven't yet been checked by a human to confirm they're appropriate and support the claims made. Connections may shift as more content is reviewed and validated.

This is an exploration tool, not medical advice. Always discuss findings with a qualified clinician.
